apiId.note: When dependent op needs 'apiId' param, use for_each=aws.appsync.list_graphql_apis and set apiId='{{ item.additionalAuthenticationProviders }}'

associationId.note: When dependent op needs 'associationId' param, use for_each=aws.appsync.list_source_api_associations and set associationId='{{ item.associationId }}'

domainName.note: When dependent op needs 'domainName' param, use for_each=aws.appsync.list_domain_names and set domainName='{{ item.apiAssociation }}'

fieldName.note: When dependent op needs 'fieldName' param, use for_each=aws.appsync.list_resolvers and set fieldName='{{ item.fieldName }}'

format.note: When dependent op needs 'format' param, use for_each=aws.appsync.list_types and set format='{{ item.definition }}'

functionId.note: When dependent op needs 'functionId' param, use for_each=aws.appsync.list_functions and set functionId='{{ item.functionId }}'

mergedApiIdentifier.note: When dependent op needs 'mergedApiIdentifier' param, use for_each=aws.appsync.list_source_api_associations and set mergedApiIdentifier='{{ item.mergedApiId }}'

name.note: When dependent op needs 'name' param, use for_each=aws.appsync.list_apis and set name='{{ item.name }}'

typeName.note: When dependent op needs 'typeName' param, use for_each=aws.appsync.list_resolvers_by_function and set typeName='{{ item.typeName }}'

GetApi.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.api.*

GetApiAssociation.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.apiAssociation.*

GetApiCache.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.apiCache.*

GetChannelNamespace.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.channelNamespace.*

GetDataSource.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.dataSource.*

GetDataSourceIntrospection.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.introspectionResult.*

GetDomainName.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.domainNameConfig.*

GetFunction.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.functionConfiguration.*

GetGraphqlApi.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.graphqlApi.*

GetResolver.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.resolver.*

GetSchemaCreationStatus.note: Flat emit — access top-level response fields directly

GetSourceApiAssociation.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.sourceApiAssociation.*

GetType.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.type.*
